top_signals.title: Opening speech by President von der Leyen at the European Clean Tech Conference, via video message
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 19 May 2026 Ladies and gentlemen,
It is an honour to welcome you to the Clean Tech Conference 2026. Today is about Europe's world-leading clean tech community - a sector cr...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: ‘I saw bad stuff,’ says 9-year-old who hid in closet during California mosque attack
top_signals.summary: The child said his classmates and he were ushered into a closet at the mosque where they attend school, trembling in fear as shots rang out.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SMFG, Fujitsu and SoftBank forming medical alliance to help contain costs
top_signals.summary: As Japan faces another wave of retirees, technology might help keep the nation fit and control healthcare spending.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
